query:
SELECT 'games' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'teams', COUNT(*) FROM teams WHERE tournamentId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'sheets_sync_log', COUNT(*) FROM sheets_sync_log WHERE tournamentId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'tournament_phases', COUNT(*) FROM tournament_phases WHERE tournamentId = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'pools', COUNT(*) FROM pools WHERE tournamentId = 1;
